healthReason: KE-8 COMPLETE: #1430 closed via PR #1448 (merged 06:16Z by jpleva91). #1427 was closed last cycle (PR #1436). No open kernel blockers. PR budget: 0 kernel PRs open. Tests: 4639/4639 passing (3 new from PR #1448).
summary: Cycle 2026-03-30T12:00Z. KE-8 sprint fully complete. PR #1448 (fix(claude-hook): allow-path must not write to stderr) was merged at 06:16Z — closes #1430 (the director-escalated P1 blocker). Fix: all allow-path messages routed to stdout/additionalContext; stderr reserved for denials/violations only. 3 new tests added asserting zero stderr on git commit, git push, and gh CLI allow paths. Test suite: 4639/4639 passing (was 4636; +3 from PR #1448). No kernel PRs open. Swarm P0 issues (#1431, #1452) are infra/swarm scope — no kernel action available. Next sprint target: #1177 (github.pr.* policy gap blocking pr-merger-agent, recommended in #1452).

dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY: claude-hook PreToolUse output on stderr was blocking allowed actions. Claude Code's hook protocol treats any stderr from PreToolUse as a blocking error. PR #1448 fixed by routing all allow-path output to stdout/additionalContext JSON. Now safe for unattended agents.
FIRST-PARTY: .agentguard/persona.env was not covered by the no-governance-self-modification invariant.
0 governance denials this cycle. No LOCKDOWN triggers. All governed operations clean.
